<!--
Thanks for contributing to Awesome-MCoT!
Please read CONTRIBUTING.md before submitting. One paper per PR is preferred.
-->

## Type of change

- [ ] Add paper(s)
- [ ] Add dataset / benchmark
- [ ] Add RL method
- [ ] Fix typo / broken link / formatting
- [ ] Other (please describe):

## Entry being added

**Paper title:**
**Venue & year:**
**Paper URL (arXiv preferred):**
**Code URL (if any):**
**Project / dataset / HF page (if any):**

## Section it belongs to

> Which subsection of the README does this entry go into? See "Where Does My Paper Go?" in CONTRIBUTING.md.

- [ ] Datasets (Tab-1 / Tab-2 / Tab-3)
- [ ] Multimodal Reasoning via RL
- [ ] MCoT Over Various Modalities → which: ___
- [ ] MCoT Methodologies → which: ___
- [ ] Applications with MCoT Reasoning → which: ___

## Why it is in scope

> One or two sentences on how the work involves chain-of-thought style reasoning over multimodal inputs/outputs.

## Disclosure

- [ ] I am one of the authors of the paper being added.
- [ ] I am not an author / no conflict to disclose.

## Checklist

- [ ] Entry follows the format in CONTRIBUTING.md (bold title, venue badge, optional star / HF badges, `<!-- MM-YY -->` comment).
- [ ] All links resolve; no empty `()` link targets.
- [ ] Paper is not already listed (I searched the README).
- [ ] I did not modify unrelated sections.
